name: Basic Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons sauce (e.g., catsup, chili sauce, or barbecue sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix all ingredients except the sauce in a large bowl.
3. Spread the meat mixture into an ungreased loaf pan (9 X 5 X 3 inches) or shape into a loaf in an ungreased baking pan.
4. Spoon sauce onto the loaf.
5. Bake, uncovered, for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, or until done.
6. Let cool before slicing and serving.
Leftover Meat Loaf:
- BARCOCHELED MEAT LOAF: Place slices of meatloaf in a skillet with barbecue sauce (and water if desired). Cover and cook over low heat, brushing occasionally with the sauce until hot.
- POTATO-TOPPED MEAT LOAF: Prepare instant mashed potatoes as directed. Spread on slices and sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese. Broil for 2 minutes or until melted. Serve hot.
- SOUPED-UP MEAT LOAF: Mix condensed cream soup (and milk) in a skillet. Place slices, turning to coat all sides. Cover and simmer until heated through.
